name: Open SSM Sessions to Multiple EC2 Instances
description: Simulates an attacker opening SSM interactive sessions to multiple EC2 instances in rapid succession, using ssm:StartSession as an alternative to SSH that leaves fewer network traces.
prerequisites: 3 EC2 instances with SSM agent and AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore role (stratus-red-team-ssm-session-*)
detection_signal: ssm:StartSession called on multiple instances in rapid succession from unexpected principals — especially combined with ssm:TerminateSession
